title: rosa carolina f. alba
intro: Rosa carolina f. alba is a fragrant white-flowering variant of the Carolina rose (Rosa carolina), a wild rose native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa carolina f. alba include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
